infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: This app uses location to find nearby restaurants and calculate distances.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: This app uses location to find nearby restaurants and calculate distances.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: This app uses camera to take profile photos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: This app uses photo library to select profile photos.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: This app uses microphone for voice messages in chat.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow Food Buddy to use your location to find nearby restaurants.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: Allow Food Buddy to use your location to find nearby restaurants.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow Food Buddy to use your location to find nearby restaurants.

plugins.photosPermission: The app accesses your photos to let you share them with your friends.
plugins.cameraPermission: The app accesses your camera to let you take photos.
